info.title: DevPlatformApi
info.description:
- return HttpOK(HttpCode-200) when process work successfully
- return HttpException(201) when resource created successfully
- return HttpException(204) when resource deleted successfully
- return HttpException(400) when request is invalid (bad request), or other errors
- return HttpException(401) when access_token or api_key is invalid or expired
- return HttpException(403) when permission to access source is denied
- return HttpException(404) when source not found, or not exist
- return HttpException(405) when method not allowed, or not supported
- return HttpException(413) when request payload is too large
- return HttpException(415) when request content type is not supported
- return HttpException(422) when request is invalid (unprocessable entity)
- return HttpException(429) when too many requests in a period of time
- return HttpException(500) when something wrong in internal server
- return HttpException(502) when bad gateway, or gateway timeout
- return HttpException(503) when service unavailable, or maintenance
- return HttpException(504) when gateway timeout, or service timeout

get.description: get tenant list based on limit and next_token, return tenant model list

post.description: create tenant based on create model, return tenant model

get.description: get tenant by id, return tenant model

patch.description: update tenant based on update model, return tenant model

delete.description: delete tenant by id, return success response or 404 error

get.description: get user list based on limit and next_token, return user model list

post.description: create user based on create model, return user model

get.description: get user by id, return user model

patch.description: update user based on update model, return user model

delete.description: delete user by id, return success response or 404 error

post.description:
bind device to user based on sn_type and sn, return user model
:note: create device schema if device not exists
unbind device from user based on sn_type and sn, return user model

get.description: get device list based on limit and next_token, return device model list

post.description: create device based on create model, return device model

get.description: get device by id, return device model

patch.description: update device based on update model, return device model

delete.description: delete device by id, return success response or 404 error

get.description: get file list of owner_id/virtual_id based on limit and next_token, return file model list
get file by id, return file model

patch.description: update file based on update model, return file model

delete.description: delete file by id, return success response or 404 error

post.description: execute AI process on file based on file_id, return file model
merge files based on file_id_list/group_id and owner_id/virtual_id, return file model
